No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to ending hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course trains neuroscience researchers, whose work supports mental health (Target 3.4) and R&D for diseases (Target 3.b). The competency 'care for life phenomena' reinforces this link.

Quality Education.reason: As a graduate course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and teaches relevant professional skills for employment in research and academia (Target 4.4).

Gender Equality.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to clean water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops skills for high-value employment in R&D, indirectly supporting technological upgrading and innovation (Target 8.2) and productive employment (Target 8.5).
evidence: 提升跨領域之研究合作的潛能

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course is fundamental to training R&D personnel, directly supporting Target 9.5 by enhancing scientific research capabilities and encouraging innovation through effective communication.
evidence: 研究計劃提案案例討論

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly covers 'Academic ethics,' 'Responsible conduct of research,' and 'Scientific ethics, integrity and misconduct,' directly contributing to accountable institutions (Target 16.6) and reducing misconduct (Target 16.5).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: A core competency is to 'Enhance the potential for interdisciplinary research cooperation,' which directly supports knowledge-sharing partnerships (Target 17.16).
evidence: 提升跨領域之研究合作的潛能
